Name: Dimensions Algonquin Highlands
Title (Page): Dimensions Algonquin Highlands - Cannabis Retreat in Algonquin Highlands
Short Description: Accommodation and meals are included in your rate. Your accommodation in a private cabin includes all programmed activities, one cannabis psychedelic plant ceremony,  and meals prepared daily to suit all dietary needs by Dimensions Algonquin Highlands' Executive Chef Miriam Echeverria. These all-inclusive accommodations, amenities, and activities (including two wellness activities (3 on 4 night stays), two bodywork (3 on 4 nights stays), outdoor activities, evening gatherings, worksheets, and meditations) are all conducted by Dimensions' staff.

Name: ELEVATED MIND RETREATS
Title (Page): ELEVATED MIND RETREATS - Psilocybin Truffle Retreat in Almkerk
Short Description: Elevated Mind Retreats: Psilocybin Retreat Offers & Packages Discover our range of safe, legal psilocybin retreat experiences designed to support your healing, growth, and inner transformation. Located in the peaceful Dutch countryside, our retreats combine expert facilitation with complementary practices to create a holistic journey. Group Retreats Our group retreats welcome up to average eight participants, fostering connection and shared healing. Experience guided psilocybin ceremonies alongside breathwork, cacao ceremonies, ice baths, and integration support in a safe, supportive setting. Women's Retreats Designed exclusively for women, these retreats offer a nurturing space to explore, heal, and empower yourself alongside other women. Enjoy all the core offerings with additional women-focused practices and community building.
